articles.title: Kansas coach Bill Self non-committal if he'll return next year due to health concerns
articles.original_title: Kansas coach Bill Self non-committal if he'll return next year due to health concerns
articles.summary: Hall of Fame Kansas basketball coach Bill Self said after a crushing loss to St. John's that he hasn't decided if he'll be back next season or retire.

articles.title: Knicks rout Wizards 145-113 to win their 6th straight and send Washington to its 16th straight loss
articles.original_title: Knicks rout Wizards 145-113 to win their 6th straight and send Washington to its 16th straight loss
articles.summary: Karl-Anthony Towns had 26 points and 16 rebounds, Jalen Brunson scored 23 points and the New York Knicks beat the Washington Wizards 145-113 on Sunday night for their sixth straight victory.  Josh Hart made all three 3-point shots and added 16 points as New York handed Washington its 16th straight loss.

articles.title: Sorokin has NHL-leading 7th shutout, Horvat's early goal stands as Islanders edge Blue Jackets 1-0
articles.original_title: Sorokin has NHL-leading 7th shutout, Horvat's early goal stands as Islanders edge Blue Jackets 1-0
articles.summary: Ilya Sorokin made 26 saves for his NHL-leading seventh shutout of the season, Bo Horvat scored the only goal on the first shot of the game and the New York Islanders moved back into a playoff spot with a 1-0 victory over the Columbus Blue Jackets on Sunday night.  The shutout was his franchise-record 29th and Sorokin tied his single-season high set in 2021-22.  Horvat scored 1:25 into the game, taking a pass from Anders Lee and beating Jet Greaves with a snap shot.

articles.title: Iowa 3 sends No. 1 seed Florida home. See the shot that shocked defending champs
articles.original_title: Iowa 3 sends No. 1 seed Florida home. See the shot that shocked defending champs
articles.summary: A 3-pointer from Alvaro Folgueiras with 4.5 seconds left lifted Iowa to a 73-72 win over reigning national champion Florida in the NCAA Tournament

articles.title: Smith's late goal lifts Vegas past Dallas 3-2 and denies Stars' bid to clinch a playoff berth
articles.original_title: Smith's late goal lifts Vegas past Dallas 3-2 and denies Stars' bid to clinch a playoff berth
articles.summary: Reilly Smith scored the tiebreaking goal with 3:38 left in the third period and the Vegas Golden Knights beat Dallas 3-2 on Sunday night, denying the Stars' bid to clinch a playoff berth.  Vegas' Mitch Marner skated into the high slot and his shot ricocheted off two Dallas players and landed near Smith, who scored from close range past a defenseless Casey DeSmith.

articles.title: Kansas' Bill Self says he hasn't decided whether to continue his Hall of Fame coaching career
articles.original_title: Kansas' Bill Self says he hasn't decided whether to continue his Hall of Fame coaching career
articles.summary: Bill Self says he hasn't decided whether he will continue his Hall of Fame coaching career after the Kansas Jayhawks' season ended with a heartbreaking loss to St. John's in the second round of the NCAA Tournament on Sunday.  The 63-year-old Self has won two national championships and built a powerhouse during his 23 seasons in charge of the Jayhawks, but he has missed several games over the past few seasons due to heart issues and other health concerns.

articles.title: The Chicago Stars get a 2-1 win over the Kansas City Current in the NWSL
articles.original_title: The Chicago Stars get a 2-1 win over the Kansas City Current in the NWSL
articles.summary: Tessa Dellarose scored her first professional goal in her first start and the Chicago Stars beat the Kansas City Current 2-1 on Sunday in the National Women's Soccer League.  In the only other match Sunday, San Diego edged the Utah Royals 2-1.  Chicago's win was the team's first of the season after losing 4-0 to Angel City FC last weekend, and it came in windy conditions at the Stars' new home, Northwestern Medicine Field at Martin Stadium.
